themes.label: Creation
themes.summary: This chapter underscores creation, the heavens and earth, or God’s creative ordering work. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 2 verses. Commentary leans on "Jerome on Commentary on Ezekiel: (Chapter 15, verse 1 onwards) And the word of the Lord came...". Word-study detail reinforces "הָאָ֖רֶץ: the land - the earth (at large, or partitively a land)".
